name: 2026-05-28 Governance Comparison EDSA Tramo Flyover Three Days TH
description:
Concrete is breaking off an EDSA flyover wall in Pasay.

DPWH says the repair will be 'fast-tracked' and done within three days. Pakitang-tao lang. The flyover only became a priority once cameras showed up.

In countries with audited maintenance schedules, the fix happens before the photo. Here it happens after.

Concrete is breaking off an EDSA flyover wall in Pasay.

DPWH says the repair will be 'fast-tracked' and done within three days. Pakitang-tao lang. The flyover only became a priority once cameras showed up.

In countries with audited maintenance schedules, the fix happens before the photo. Here it happens after.

DPWH 'fast-tracked' repair of damaged EDSA-Tramo flyover wall in Pasay, news cycle 2026-05-28 (Philstar; PNA). Secretary Vince Dizon ordered completion within three days after reports of protruding concrete on the structure's wall; coordinated with local traffic authorities to manage expected bottleneck. Part of broader EDSA rehab project running since Dec 2025.
